hero.subtitle: +15 years of experience in Family & Estate Law, Social Security and Banking Law. Personalized service throughout Brazil.

about.heading: Justice with faith, compassion and purpose
about.p1_post: in the legal market, Dra. Kênia Garcia has built her career on a fundamental pillar: the belief that every person deserves to be treated with dignity, respect and empathy.
about.quote: "My mission has always been to provide a humanized service, where the client feels welcomed and understood. I believe each case is unique and that, more than offering legal solutions, it is essential to stand by my client at every step of the process."
about.p2: Guided by faith and Christian principles, Dra. Kênia sees the practice of law as a divine calling — an opportunity to serve others and bring justice to those who need it most.
about.verse: "Blessed are those who hunger and thirst for righteousness, for they shall be filled." — Matthew 5:6
about.name: Dra. Kênia Garcia

items.q: How much does a consultation cost?
items.a: Each case is unique and fees are defined after individual analysis, respecting the Bar Association table and the complexity of the demand. Get in touch for an initial assessment.
Time varies according to complexity and type of action. We work to speed up as much as possible, seeking out-of-court solutions when feasible and closely monitoring proceedings.

items.q: Can I be sure of the outcome of my case?
items.a: No lawyer can guarantee results. What we guarantee is honest analysis, solid strategy and total dedication to achieve the best possible result.

items.q: I don't know if I have a right. How do I find out?
items.a: The first step is a consultation to evaluate your situation. Many people discover they have rights they were unaware of. Contact us and let's analyze your case.

items.q: I'm afraid of going to court and making things worse.
items.a: This is a common concern. That's why we offer transparent guidance on the risks and benefits of each path, so you can make the best decision with security.
Yes! We serve in person and online, throughout Brazil. You can schedule a video consultation with full comfort and security.
